speaker: speaker1
text: Our benefits usually include medical insurance , public accumulation fund and allowances .

speaker: speaker1
text: If you go on a business trip , you will enjoy the allowance . It is 200 yuan per day .

speaker: speaker2
text: Well , I see . And what about the vacation in our company ?

speaker: speaker1
text: As a new-comer , you usually have five days of annual vacation . And remember you have to fill out a request form , if you want to ask for leave .

speaker: speaker2
text: Will our company have some recreational activities ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Of course . In spring and autumn , we will hold some sports actives . And in movie seasons , we bulk purchase film tickets .
